name: Pasta with Roasted Carrot Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine carrots, onion, olive oil, and garlic. Spread mixture on a baking sheet.
3. Bake for 45 minutes, stirring twice, until golden brown and tender.
4. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
5. Puree roasted vegetables with vegetable broth in a food processor or blender.
6. Toss purée with hot pasta.
7. Serve immediately.
Serves 2. Per serving: 491 cal; 14 g protein; 9 g fat; 89 g carbs; 0 chol; 78 mg sodium; 15 g fiber; vegan.
